eggplants-with-minced-meat-argiro.name: Eggplants With Minced Meat
instructions: Cut the eggplants into thin slides and add them to 2 sets.
Place them with olive oil and balsamic, salt them and add the thyme.
Bake for 15-20 minutes until soft.

elegant-pork-tenderloin.name: Elegant Pork Tenderloin
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Mix together bread crumbs and olive oil in a bowl until moist and sticky enough to adhere to meat. Place pork on a shallow cooking sheet. Press crumb mixture onto all sides of meat until there is no pink showing, about 1/4-inch thick.
Bake in the preheated oven until pork is no longer pink in the center, about 35 minutes. An instant-read thermometer should read at least 63°C (63 degrees C).
Let pork rest for 10 minutes, then cut into 1/2-inch slices.

endive-spears-with-smoked-salmon-horsera.name: Endive Spears With Smoked Salmon, Horseradish Cream, And Dill
instructions: Mix cream cheese, capers, chopped dill, lemon juice, lemon peel, and horseradish in small bowl. Season with salt and pepper.

Drop 1 teaspoon horseradish cream at pointed end of each endive spear. Sprinkle with onion. Cut salmon into 1-inch pieces; drape over cream. Garnish with dill sprigs and radishes, if desired. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Cover; chill.

endive-apples-and-grapes.name: Endive, Apples, And Grapes

ingredients.item: Heads of belgian endive (12–16 ounces total)
Fleur de sel or other sea salt

instructions: Quarter and core apples.
Using a vegetable peeler, shave off a thin strip of peel down the center of each apple quarter, leaving the remaining peel intact.
Melt butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium-low heat.
Add endive, cut side down, to the skillet.
Add apple wedges, 1 cut side down, to the skillet.
Add grape clusters and scatter rosemary sprigs over.
Cook, uncovered, without turning or stirring, until the endive is caramelized on the bottom and apples are just tender, 15 to 20 minutes.
Carefully turn endive, apples, and grapes over; baste with liquid in the skillet and cook until apples are very tender, 5 to 10 minutes longer.
Season with fleur de sel and freshly ground black pepper.
Transfer the endive mixture to a platter.
Add 2 to 3 tablespoons water to the skillet, scraping up any caramelized bits, forming a small amount of sauce.
Spoon sauce over the endive mixture and serve.
